info.title: FaultTrace-RAG API
info.description: Counterfactual Fault Localization for Corpus-Level LLM Analytics Pipelines. Provides deterministic corpus data, procedural queries, dual gold evaluation, and traced pipeline execution.

post.description:
Generate deterministic nested corpus worlds and procedural queries.

Creates worlds at the specified scales from a fixed seed.
All generated data is deterministic and reproducible.

get.summary: List records in a world with pagination and filters

post.description: Generate procedural queries for a corpus world and store them.

get.summary: Get gold answer for a query

post.description: Execute a pipeline against a query and store the run.
Generate an extraction plan without executing the pipeline.

get.summary: Get trace events for a run

schema.title: Response Get Run Trace Api V1 Runs  Run Id  Trace Get

get.summary: Counterfactual fault attribution for a run
get.description:
Run counterfactual oracle-replacement attribution on a completed run.

Returns Shapley values and REF scores for each pipeline component:
- scope (R): which records were retrieved
- facts (E): which field values were extracted
- aggregation (A): how facts were reduced to an answer

post.description: Run counterfactual oracle-replacement attribution on a batch of completed runs.

get.summary: Pipeline leaderboard — accuracy and error breakdown
get.description: Aggregate pipeline runs into a leaderboard with accuracy and mean loss per pipeline.

get.summary: Get certification result for a run
Evaluate a policy across all completed runs

get.description: Get metadata for a run artifact by run_id.

schema.title: Response List Datasets Api V1 Datasets Get
